sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.body: Texas Guitar Exchange is pleased to provide this manufacturing proposal for the Eco-Loom Scrubber Handle Prototype project. This proposal is based on the current governed bid summary and is intended for customer review.

sections.title: Project Scope
sections.body: This proposal covers manufacturing of 10 units as specified in the current design documentation.

sections.title: Deliverables
sections.body: Upon completion, the following will be delivered:

sections.title: Pricing Summary
sections.body: Pricing is based on the current design revision and stated quantity.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.body: This proposal is based on the following assumptions:
bullets: Pricing is based on the current design revision.
Pricing assumes the stated production quantity of 10 units.
Material, finish, and schedule changes may require pricing revision.
Customer will supply raw materials as agreed.

sections.title: Exclusions
sections.body: The following are not included in this proposal:

sections.title: Next Steps
bullets: Confirm material availability and delivery schedule

assumptions.statement: Pricing is based on the current design revision.
Pricing assumes the stated production quantity of 10 units.
Material, finish, and schedule changes may require pricing revision.
Customer will supply raw materials as agreed.

terms.title: Proposal Validity
terms.statement: This proposal is valid for review only while stated assumptions remain unchanged.

terms.title: Revisions
terms.statement: Design or quantity changes may require proposal revision.

terms.title: Scheduling
terms.statement: Production scheduling begins after approval and material confirmation.

next_steps: Confirm material availability and delivery schedule
notes: Prototype assumptions have since been superseded by production-quantity customer requirements. This fixture remains a historical sample until ECO-LOOM-BID-REVISION-1.
